summary: Repaired the rejected CLI wrapper task by aligning command and artifact shapes with the Site Telemetry Local Tools contract. Added explicit publish/pull plan/run subcommands, preserved compatibility publish --send and pull --import forms, updated dry-run/send/import result envelopes to emit publish_plan, pull_plan, and run_result schemas with separated transport, pull, local admission, and remote finalization posture, and restored the task dependency on 1409.
residuals: Scheduler/runtime recurring publish-pull loops remain later work.
The pull run wrapper still performs remote poll/import preview only; local admission callback wiring remains later runtime work.
